top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
top_signals.summary: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: How China’s Wealthy Sidestep Strict Rules to Get Money Out of the Country
top_signals.summary: China’s capital controls remain among the world’s strictest. Individuals are generally limited to transferring $50,000 overseas each year, while emigrants are given a one-time opportunity to move their assets abroad.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Commodities regulator alleges Winklevosses' Gemini crypto exchange was politically targeted
top_signals.summary: CFTC chair Michael Selig said the agency's enforcement action against Gemini was part of a broader campaign against the crypto industry under President Biden.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US, NATO allies to launch scaled-back Baltic Sea drills
top_signals.summary: Officials say the smaller footprint reflects operational realities rather than waning commitment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk

top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Document for The Customs Tariff (Establishment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find the UK’s most favoured nation tariff rates as referenced in The Customs Tariff (Establishment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020.

top_signals.title: QXO’s $3 Billion Junk Bond Sale for Takeover Draws Strong Demand
top_signals.summary: QXO Building Products Inc.’s $3 billion junk-bond offering to fund its purchase of rival TopBuild Corp. has received more than triple the amount in demand from investors.

top_signals.title: Allegion to Attend 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference
top_signals.summary: Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE) President and CEO John H. Stone will discuss the company’s long-term strategy at the 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference on Tuesday, June 9. The conference will be held at Loews Chicago Hotel. A live listen-only webcast will be accessible via Allegion’s investor website at investor.allegion.com or directly by clicking [...]

alerts.title: Rare Yamazaki whisky sells for record $1 million
alerts.summary: Bottled exclusively for a club in Nagoya and autographed by Suntory's chief blender, the 50-year-old Japanese whisky sold for almost twice its estimate.
